description: This file contains a JwtService class responsible for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT) for authentication purposes within a Spring Boot application. It manages token issuance, validation, and extraction of user information from tokens.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service class responsible for issuing and validating JWT access tokens

methods.name: JwtService
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the JWT service by validating the secret key configuration and generating the signing key.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a signed JWT access token for a given user, including claims like email and roles, with an expiration based on configuration.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Parses and validates a given JWT token, returning the claims if valid.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user UUID from the claims stored in the JWT.
